conbody.p: Learn about known limitations in this release.

ul.li: When vhost0 and vrouter pods exist, JCNR-vRouter responds with duplicate ping packets.
If you specify the global vhost IPv6 address when you deploy vrouter, the vrouter does not populate IPv6 next hops.
Security Group rules with multiple matching protocols do not work.
JCNR-vRouter-Agent could crash as a result of JCNR-vRouter restart.
JCNR-vRouter can crash when running in a VMWare Tanzu environment and using multiple master nodes.
If you deactivate the protocol-type for the vrouter channel with the command: deactivate routing-options forwarding-table channel vrouter protocol-type, the channel does not go down.
